stemHtml: If, in flight, the needle and ball of turn and slip indicator are on the right, the aircraft is:

options.a: turning left with too much right rudder deflection for a co-ordinated turn.
options.b: turning left with not enough right rudder deflection for a co-ordinated turn.
options.c: turning right with not enough right rudder deflection for a co-ordinated turn.
options.d: turning right with too much right rudder deflection for a co-ordinated turn.
